testcase.name: test_register_device_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_features.py:173: in test_register_device_endpoint_exists pytest.fail("FAIL: /api/notifications/register-device endpoint not found!") E Failed: FAIL: /api/notifications/register-device endpoint not found!

testcase.name: test_register_device_android_platform
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_features.py:198: in test_register_device_android_platform assert response.status_code in [200, 201, 422, 500], f"Unexpected: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected: 404 E assert 404 in [200, 201, 422, 500] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
